# outerTextProvider

**Instance Property**

The outer text to display in the complication.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var outerTextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

The complication ignores the text provider’s tint color. It always displays the outer text as white.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **gaugeProvider**: The gauge to display in the complication.
- **leadingTextProvider**: The text to display on the leading edge of the gague.
- **trailingTextProvider**: The text to display on the trailing edge of the gauge.
